name: humbl-advert
description: Ask your AI assistant about PPC competitors, market share, brand appearances, and live ad searches — powered by Humbl.ai data.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your Humbl.ai API key. Ask your administrator to generate one at https://humbl.ai/admin/mcp/mcpapikey/

tools.name: market_share
tools.description: Top domains by ad exposure for a location

tools.name: competitors
tools.description: Top advertisers for a keyword, location, and device

tools.name: domain_data
tools.description: Ad exposure history for a specific domain

tools.name: ppc_overview
tools.description: Recently detected PPC sites for a location

tools.name: brand_lookup
tools.description: Recent brand appearances in ad listings

tools.name: general_search
tools.description: Search the ad database by domain or keyword
